tips.title: Tips for good registration
tips.quality: rate players relative to your organization, not professionals. The best player at each position should get 5 stars, and others should be rated in comparison.
tips.height: fill in accurately — the algorithm uses this data to balance the teams.
tips.position: register the player's main position for better distribution across teams.
tips.shareLink: share the link with your players so they can register themselves.

empty.title: No players registered
empty.subtitle: Add players or share the registration link

dialog.approveAlert: This player registered via the public link. Review their data and give a rating to approve them.
